narrative_en: The regime picture moved: breadth state: confirming -> mixed; ai concentration risk: contained -> elevated; momentum concentration: narrow-megacap -> broadening.
Regime coherence 100/100 — the observed cross-asset tape is largely aligned.
Quietly building beneath the surface: persistent leadership concentration (3/5) with no active alert — attention the tape is not currently paying.
The next scheduled resolution point is United Kingdom CPI.

نقطة الحسم المجدولة التالية هي United Kingdom CPI.
convergence_note: Convergence — coherence 100/100 (coherent); velocity accelerating; 2 confirming / 0 diverging links; 1 underpriced signal(s).
